untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of consecutive pivot sequences (multiple HH-HL pairs forming unbroken structure) and validation of structural integrity across multiple bars. The allowed indicator set provides only single-bar pivot levels (pivot, r1, s1, r2, s2) without sequence-tracking or multi-bar structure validation logic. Detecting '[THRESHOLD_NEEDED] consecutive higher pivot highs' with 'no lower low between any HH-HL pair' requires state machine or lookback array logic not expressible in simple 3-field condition rules.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using available pivot indicators for single-bar comparisons, but core rule (multi-bar pivot sequence validation with structural integrity checks) cannot be reliably encoded. Recommend implementing custom pivot sequence detector or using bar-by-bar structure validation outside this rule engine.
